$comment: Curated variant-resolution layer for the GENERATED tool/parity/contracts/component-contracts.json. The generator records the DISTINCT fonts a component shows (its `observed` pairs) but cannot label which font is which size variant; this hand-curated file does. EVERY value here is cross-checked by test/support/component_spec.dart against the generator's observed/text pairs — a curated number that is NOT a real spec value fails loud. Kept SEPARATE from the generated JSON so gen_component_contract.mjs --write never clobbers it. Add component variant entries as components are built, e.g. "MxPrimaryButton": { "medium": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": 700 } }.
